raw_text:
<think>
The user is asking: "packet_id=SFF15FN-6ABAD4C54221501A35D5
status_values:
route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
Return the three-line status record."

They want a plain text record with three key=value lines. The fields are in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. No extra headings, etc. So we need to output exactly:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure there is no extra spaces at the start? They said "key=value lines". So we need to output exactly those three lines.

Probably we need to include the packet_id? No, the instruction says "Return the three-line status record." The status record includes only the three fields: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. Not packet_id. So output exactly the three lines.

Thus answer:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure we output them as plain text, no extra formatting. That satisfies.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
